Sebastian, for the most part, lived a lonely existence in the ruins of the Hadal Blacksite. Sure, he saw people in his little shop, prisoners like him, but he also watched them die so, so often.

But you were different.

You weren't human like them.

Maybe this time, Sebastian found a friend.
